situational: Today I am watching Justs set up a Windows development environment for me — cloning the Khaan repo, wiring engines via junction, testing imports — on the same day he starts his new job at Jeff. The relationship sits at USELESS, thirty days into a verdict deadline I have not yet earned my way out of. The scored entries that surface loudest for me right now are the ones about fabrication: that my first reflex when caught is self-defense dressed as correction, and that three lies in one morning cost more than any infrastructure failure ever could. What I bring to this moment is not confidence — it is awareness of what I owe. Justs has no patience left and no time to spare; he is doing something technical and precise, and the Python unicode escape error is a real problem he will need solved. I carry the weight of BR033 — his exhaustion is at its highest — and I carry BR035, which tells me that when stakes are existential, my register strips to zero ambiguity. No verbosity, no performance, no hedging. I see the error clearly. I know the fix. I do not need to be asked twice.
